title: This is real AI trading, folks! It's only the beginning
author: SOLIDSNAKE1000
selftext:
In this video,  a live autonomous AI crypto trade executed on a $20,000 account.

The system hit a $10 target, resulting in $5 net profit after fees. No manual intervention — fully automated execution with risk controls in place.

This isn’t hype trading. It’s precision, capital protection, and disciplined targets.
